_comment: Dev / slice-6 Phase A CANDIDATE profile. Unpromoted flags, explicitly documented: ADAPTIVE_CONTEXT has a GO verdict at dev-20 x2 + n=40 (COST_AB.md); FAST_ABSTAIN is a candidate pending its dev arm. Overlay ON TOP of the inherited wave-F profile env. Do NOT use for holdout without the user's explicit call -- flipping mid-rotation confounds the window trend.
